overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character with red hair walking through a stormy forest at night. The character traverses grassy terrain, follows a riverbank, and wades through shallow water while lightning illuminates the dark sky.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the river, with the water visible to the right

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming the forest boundary
dark flowing water reflecting the stormy sky
tall grass and ferns covering the forest floor
shadowed mountains visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense forest clearing at night, approaching a river. Tall grass surrounds the path while pine trees frame the scene on both sides, and distant mountains are barely visible through the stormy haze.

agents.ego_description: following the curve of the riverbank, keeping the water to the left

entered.detail: sandy and pebbled beach area along the water's edge
large decaying tree trunks lying on the bank

segments.scene_description: The character follows the sandy riverbank, with the river now flowing alongside on the left. Fallen logs litter the right side of the path while the forest continues in the background.

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the storm clouds and reflects off the river surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rocky shore as lightning flashes across the sky

entered.detail: rocky and uneven terrain replacing the sandy beach
dark turbulent clouds with visible lightning illumination

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rocky as the character continues along the bank. A dramatic lightning strike lights up the storm clouds overhead, briefly illuminating the entire scene with bright white light.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with visible current

events.description: character steps off the bank and begins wading through the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river, moving against the gentle current with water reaching the ankles

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible stones beneath the surface
smooth stones and pebbles visible under the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the shallow water. The current creates small ripples around the character's legs as they navigate between visible rocks on the riverbed.

events.description: character exits the river and steps onto the grassy bank, entering denser forest vegetation

agents.ego_description: leaving the water behind and walking into the dense forest undergrowth

entered.detail: thick tall grass and ferns covering the forest floor
dense bushes and low vegetation flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the river and enters a denser section of forest. Tall grass and thick undergrowth surround the path as the trees close in, creating a more enclosed and intimate forest environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy nocturnal forest that transitions from an open clearing into a river crossing and back into dense woodland. It begins with the character walking through a grassy clearing framed by pine trees, moving steadily toward a river under a hazy, mountain-lined horizon. As the path shifts to a sandy riverbank, the camera follows the character past fallen logs before the terrain turns rocky and a sudden lightning strike brilliantly illuminates the storm clouds above. The scene then shifts as the character wades into the shallow river, navigating through ripples and riverbed rocks before finally exiting the water. The movement concludes as the character enters a thicker section of the forest, where the trees close in and tall undergrowth creates a more enclosed environment.
